  "decision": "fail",

  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 85,

  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Sheave misalignment detected via straightedge method",
    "Misalignment exceeds manufacturer tolerance (typically 0.5° angular or 0.5 mm offset per 100 mm diameter)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work and tag out equipment",
    "Realign sheaves using laser alignment tool or dial indicator to within manufacturer specification",
    "Re-inspect alignment before closing out"
  ],
  "rationale": "Sheave misalignment causes accelerated belt wear, vibration, and potential coupling failure. Manufacturer guides specify tight alignment tolerances; visible gap under straightedge indicates deviation beyond acceptable limits. Work is rough-complete but must be corrected before acceptance.",
  "references": [
    "Manufacturer installation guides for belt drives (e.g., Gates, SKF alignment tolerances)",
    "ANSI/AGMA 9005-E02 Industrial Gear Lubrication (alignment section)",
    "ISO 14691:2008 Flexible couplings — Alignment"
  ]
}
